title: Canadian Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry dish with a hint of Canadian flavor.

ingredients.name: Herbal tea-infused oil
ingredients.notes: Add a hint of herbal flavor

instructions: Heat the herbal tea-infused oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the crispy bacon and cook until crispy, then remove from the skillet.
Add the frozen vegetables to the skillet and cook until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the stir-fry sauce, soy sauce, and Canadian maple syrup.
Pour the sauce into the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked bacon, ginger, and green onions to the skillet and stir to combine.
Serve the stir-fry over cooked rice.
Garnish with additional green onions and crispy bacon, if desired.
